item.title: Amazon’s ‘Melania’ documentary stumbles in second weekend
item.description: After a better-than-expected opening weekend in theaters, box office for Amazon’s “Melania”fell 67%.

item.title: Crypto.com places $70M bet on AI.com domain ahead of Super Bowl
item.description: The purchase rewrites the domain record books -- not that the crypto industry has ever been accused of restraint when it comes to spending.

item.title: Okay, I’m slightly less mad about that ‘Magnificent Ambersons’ AI project
item.description: But this is still a bad idea.

item.title: TechCrunch Mobility: Is $16B enough to build a profitable robotaxi business?
item.description: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility — your central hub for news and insights on the future of transportation.

item.title: San Francisco’s pro-billionaire march draws dozens
item.description: A march supporting California’s billionaires didn’t exactly draw a huge crowd on Saturday.
